assumptions: Task 1 (code hardening + comments) was verifiably complete across 8 prior committed slices, so I completed Task 2 (the tests) this session — the actual blocker for the flagged criteria [2]/[5]/[8] — rather than re-verify Task 1 a 9th time with no progress.
Combined both required test files into one auth-redis-resilience.test.ts (grooming context explicitly permits combining), covering all 6 cases plus a null-resolve no-throw variant.

Mocked env-validation (../config/env), @carbon/kv, and heavy deps (resend/email/simplewebauthn/supabase) so tests run without a live environment; used clearAllMocks (keeps factory implementations) plus per-test mockRejectedValueOnce for the set-fails case.

change: Verified packages/auth/src/services/auth-redis-resilience.test.ts covers all 6 Redis-down cases (getUserClaims DB fallback, sendVerificationCode false, verifyEmailCode false, both passkey getAndDelete* null, updateCompanySession cookie); auth test/typecheck/lint all pass
reason: resolved: sendVerificationCode now fails closed — verification.server.ts checks redis.set's return value (`if (!stored) return false;`) so a null-resolve (Redis down under withResilience) skips the email and returns false, satisfying criterion [2]; case-2b test tightened to assert false on the null-set path. All 6 Redis-down cases covered; auth test/typecheck/lint pass.
